zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard De Gordon於1135年出生在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾戈登。她於1182年與Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾戈登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard De Gordon was born in 1135, in Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse in 1182, in Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard De Gordon est née en 1135, à Gordon, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse en 1182, à Gordon, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard De Gordon wurde 1135 in Gordon, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1182 in Gordon, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard De Gordon è nata il nel 1135 nel Gordon, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse nel 1182, nel Gordon, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard De Gordon(은)는 1135년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 고든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1182년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 고든에서 Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard De Gordon родилась в 1135 г. в местности гордон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse в 1182 г. в местности гордон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
